prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of ADI stock, I estimated an annualized volatility of approximately 30%. For an 18-day horizon, this translates to roughly 3.7% daily volatility scaled appropriately. The point estimate assumes a random walk (no drift), while confidence intervals are calculated using log-normal distribution assumptions typical for stock prices. The 50% CI reflects ±3.7% range, 80% CI reflects ±6.4% range, and 90% CI reflects ±8.2% range from the current price.
